stages.name: unit_tests
stages.evidence: test/list_mutants_command_test adds the audit repro: with the optional/error_path/errdefer/integer_boundary/loop_boundary fixtures and the six stable Phase-2 operators enabled, list_mutants.generate now emits at least one mutant for each of optional_orelse_unreachable, optional_null_check, error_catch_unreachable, errdefer_remove, integer_literal_boundary, and loop_boundary (before wiring, generate collected only the four Phase-1 modules and every assertion failed with 0 such mutants). A second test asserts config.load rejects enabling a preview operator (optional_orelse_default) with error.Invalid while a stable operator still loads (before the fix the preview operator loaded successfully and would emit zero). Full suite green (499 tests).

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: full self-mutation dogfood of zentinel's own generators is gated to the Phase 5 stages (task 085); the wiring/rejection fix is deterministic and proven by a behavioral test that emits 0 Phase-2 mutants (and accepts a preview operator) without it.

residual_risk: Wiring the four Phase-2 collectors into both generators changes only which operators emit when ENABLED; the default config enables `phase1` only, so a default run is unchanged. The existing run_command and list_mutants snapshots use sources (calc/helper) that contain no optional/catch/errdefer/comparison-bound-literal/loop construct, so they are byte-unchanged and the full suite stays green.

Preview operators are now rejected in [mutators] enabled. This is a behavior change for any config that explicitly named a preview operator; no test, fixture, or doctest does (preview names appear only in docs/MUTATOR_SPEC.md and docs/ROADMAP.md, which already document preview mutators as backlog), and the phase1/phase2/all_stable group aliases only ever expand to stable operators.

scripts/release_acceptance.py's '12 stable operators' claim is now true (all 12 emit) but the script itself is reconciled under task 110 (out of this task's allowed files); this task makes the claim accurate rather than editing the certifier.
